subtitle.description: Text configuration for the subtitle of the subscription screen. Mapped via subtitleComponentMapper into a TextConfig entity using the text and color fields. Displayed in the subTitleTextView with Typography.T5 and FontWeights.MEDIUM styling. If the title object is null, the subtitle is promoted to the title position and no separate subtitle is rendered.

color.description: The color applied to the subtitle text, passed to the setCascadeTexts method as the color parameter for the subTitleTextView.

new_field.description: A field defined on TextConfigApiModel. It is not used by any mapper or UI component in the current codebase—the subtitleComponentMapper only reads text and color.

text.description: The text content displayed as the subtitle on the subscription screen. Rendered in a subTitleTextView using Typography.T5 and FontWeights.MEDIUM. If the title field is null, this subtitle text is promoted to the title position and no subtitle is shown.

id.description: Unique identifier for the title component, used to look up this specific title configuration by matching against the component ID from screen parameters. Inherited from the ComponentsGenericApiModel interface.

title.description: Text configuration for the main title of the subscription screen. Mapped via titleComponentMapper into a TextConfig entity using the text and color fields. Displayed in the titleTextView with Typography.T6 and FontWeights.SEMI_BOLD styling.

color.description: The color applied to the title text, passed to the setCascadeTexts method as the color parameter for the titleTextView.

new_field.description: A field defined on TextConfigApiModel. It is not used by any mapper or UI component in the current codebase—the titleComponentMapper and descriptionMapper only read text and color.

text.description: The text content displayed as the main title on the subscription screen. Rendered in a titleTextView using Typography.T6 and FontWeights.SEMI_BOLD. If both title and subtitle are absent, the view is hidden. If title is null but subtitle exists, the subtitle is shown in the title position instead.
